user_brief: Example: a paper boat drifts from a quiet pond into an open sea at sunset.
global_style: Cinematic, warm golden hour, 16:9, photorealistic, gentle camera moves

segments.title: 镜头一（0–10s）
segments.prompt: Shot 1/3: close-up on folded paper boat floating on still pond water, lily pads, soft ripples, late afternoon light, photoreal cinematic 16:9

segments.title: 镜头二（10–20s）
segments.prompt: Shot 2/3: same paper boat, wide shot as stream widens into river, trees recede, wind slightly stronger, continuous warm sunset palette, photoreal cinematic 16:9

segments.title: 镜头三（20–30s）
segments.prompt: Shot 3/3: same boat reaches open sea horizon, gentle waves, sun low on water, sense of journey completing, photoreal cinematic 16:9
